content: 如影片，如果選擇「沒有上過學」，後面的事件會接到應該是某個跟烏鴉有關的劇情。這次錄影是在這期融災第二波拍的，印象中奧瑞塔個人劇情裡面同樣的事件也會這樣。
thread_title: ✅「已解决」奧瑞塔劇情中關於上學的事件劇情接到某個烏鴉的事件了

content:
So, the Arc2 Counter changes were put in place primarily to stop the op combo of OE Daff and 24 ultra, and in general other sources of big Temporary Counter, but this affected others and made the normal use of 24 ultra very sparse.
At the moment the Damage Scaling from All Counter, Temporary and Permanent, is reduce by -75%, making it a lot less useful to use with normal levels of counter.

I wanted to propose to leave the Temporary Counter scaling the same, but to put the Permanent Counter scaling to only -25% (or something like that), because the sources of Permanent counter are a lot lower and less cheeseable that the Temporary ones.
To help 24, Pandia and Wanda, that are the only ones, for now, that have this scalings.
thread_title: Possible Counter Scaling Change in AstralReign

content:
At the moment, Aurita has a bit of a problem to use her whole gimmick, to play a lot of cheap cards and shuffle them in the deck, because of the limitation of the Harmony effect, that limit their use.
Both Castor and Jenkin have an addendum that make so some of their cards don't activate the Harmony effect.
Could we put this on Aurita too as a nice QoF buff?
It could be 5, or even just 2, Glands that don't activate the Harmony per turn.
Let us know, tnx.
